note: Sort is Set-only — it mutates row order in a sheet or range. Sheet-level Set auto-detects the used range. Range-level Set operates only on the supplied range. SortState persists across save.

sort.description: sort spec: 'COL [DIR][, COL [DIR] ...]'. COL is a column letter (A, B, AA..XFD). DIR is asc (default) or desc. Comma-separated for multi-key sort.

sortHeader.description: treat first row as header (excluded from reorder).
